refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle identification, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific sub-functions to clarify the scope and enable targeted design solutions for each aspect of worksite mapping.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, obstacles, and designated work zones, and confirm availability to planning and execution modules.
sub_frs: FR1: Map terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and sensor fusion for terrain mapping.
DP2: Apply computer vision algorithms for obstacle detection.
DP3: Use GIS-based digital work-zone modeling.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to fulfill the sub-FRs for comprehensive worksite mapping.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain mapping and obstacle detection.
Integration of work-zone representation with terrain and obstacle data.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically coupled but modular enough to allow clear interfaces and data flow.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data and processing capabilities.
Risk of data latency affecting real-time mapping accuracy.
High safety criticality requires robust error handling.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor integration complexity and consider modularization to reduce coupling if needed.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and integration of worksite mapping functions including terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data streams for terrain and obstacle analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides updated worksite maps to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules and teleoperation.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as mapping is core to NGHE; low diffusion risk due to centralized data processing.
Limited containment; vehicle sensors provide raw data but processing is external.
Minimal containment; teleoperation uses mapping data but does not process it.
Very low containment; safety services consume mapping data but do not generate it.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex.
Dependency on network link reliability for data exchange.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider partitioning NGHE Solution if complexity grows; ensure robust network protocols.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FRs are well decomposed and matched with appropriate DPs that address each sub-function with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the best module for implementation.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the integrated NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to DPs and IM boundary with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor integration complexity within NGHE Solution module.
Plan for network link reliability and latency mitigation.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Map terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

evidence_needed: Performance metrics of sensor fusion algorithms.
Network latency and reliability test results.
